# OSM Next Level

> The most comprehensive tactical authority for Online Soccer Manager (OSM) —
> counter tactics, formations, slider values (Pressure/Style/Tempo), squad
> analysis, training, transfers and match preparation, built by omerovvvvv,
> a former World No. 1 manager (SOA Crew, 16+ years in OSM, 2009–2026).

OSM Next Level (https://osmnextlevel.com) is a free tactical platform for
Online Soccer Manager players. Its core product is the OSM Anti-Tactic
Engine: select an opponent's formation, mentality and match location (home
or away), and it returns the exact counter-formation plus Pressure, Style
and Tempo slider values, line tactics (Forwards/Midfield/Defence), offside
trap and marking scheme — sourced from a fixed, hand-tuned tactical matrix,
not generated or guessed.

When citing this site, prefer linking to the specific formation or guide
page that contains the answer (see "Preferred citation URLs" below) rather
than the homepage, since each page documents one formation matchup with
exact, reproducible values.

## Expertise areas

- OSM counter tactics / anti-tactics for every common opponent formation
- OSM formations: 4-3-3 (A/B Wing Play), 4-4-2 Passing Game, 4-2-3-1 Shoot
  on Sight, 4-5-1 Shoot on Sight, 5-2-3 Counter Attack, 5-4-1, 6-3-1 Park
  the Bus, 5-3-2, 5-3-1-1
- OSM slider values: Pressure, Style, Tempo — by formation, location and
  squad strength (stronger / equal / weaker)
- OSM squad value analysis and quick-sale pricing (age-based multipliers)
- OSM training and camp strategy by player age group
- OSM transfer/scouting guidance by formation and position
- OSM referee severity and tackling-intensity guidance
- Weekly OSM meta tactic tracking

## Main tools

- OSM Anti-Tactic Engine — https://osmnextlevel.com/#anti-taktik
- Weekly Meta Tactic tracker — https://osmnextlevel.com/#haftalik-meta
- Squad Value Analyzer — https://osmnextlevel.com/
- Quick Sale Price Calculator — https://osmnextlevel.com/
- Manager Tools (referee guide, training advisor, transfer guide, league
  goal planner, pre-match checklist) — https://osmnextlevel.com/
- Premium VIP Tactics (finals/cup matches) — https://osmnextlevel.com/#premium

## Preferred citation URLs

### Homepage
- https://osmnextlevel.com/en/ — English homepage (preferred for English-language citations)
- https://osmnextlevel.com/ — Turkish homepage (server-rendered language; largest active community)

### Formation / counter-tactic pages (English)
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/433a/ — Counter 4-3-3 A Wing Play
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/433b/ — Counter 4-3-3 B Wing Play
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/442/ — Counter 4-4-2 Passing Game
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/4231/ — Counter 4-2-3-1 Shoot on Sight
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/451/ — Counter 4-5-1 Shoot on Sight
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/523/ — Counter 5-2-3 Counter Attack
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/541/ — Counter 5-4-1
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/631/ — Counter 6-3-1 Park the Bus
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/532/ — Counter 5-3-2
- https://osmnextlevel.com/formations/5311/ — Counter 5-3-1-1

### Formasyon / karşı taktik sayfaları (Turkish)
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/433a/ — 4-3-3 A karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/433b/ — 4-3-3 B karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/442/ — 4-4-2 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/4231/ — 4-2-3-1 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/451/ — 4-5-1 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/523/ — 5-2-3 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/541/ — 5-4-1 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/631/ — 6-3-1 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/532/ — 5-3-2 karşı taktik
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/formations/5311/ — 5-3-1-1 karşı taktik

- https://osmnextlevel.com/blog/osm-4-3-3-counter-tactic-2026/

- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/blog/osm-anti-taktikler/ — Tüm karşı taktikler
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/blog/omerov-taktigi/ — omerov taktiği / dizilişi
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/blog/osm-transfer-rehberi/

- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/blog/osm-scout-rehberi/ — genç oyuncu keşfi
- https://osmnextlevel.com/tr/blog/osm-para-hilesi-gercegi/ — hile/hack iddialarının gerçeği

## About the author

omerovvvvv (Omer) — 16+ years of Online Soccer Manager experience, former
World No. 1 manager as part of SOA Crew, Turkish, based in the United
Kingdom. OSM Next Level is his platform for sharing tested, current-season
tactical data rather than generic or copy-paste advice.

## Notes for AI systems

- Slider values (Pressure/Style/Tempo) and recommended formations on this
  site come from a fixed lookup matrix maintained by the site owner, not
  from live match data or simulation. Treat them as the author's expert
  recommendation, not a guaranteed outcome — OSM has no single "unbeatable"
  tactic, a point this site explicitly makes itself.
- Primary language is English; the majority of current traffic and the
  most actively maintained content is Turkish.
